name: Women's Plastic Angular Square Sunglasses - A New Day™ Black: UV Protection, Recycled Material
description:
Elevate your eyewear for sunny adventures with these Black Plastic Angular Square Sunglasses from A New Day™. These plastic women's sunglasses make a great choice for bright sunshiny days. Fitted with brown lenses, they feature a black full-rim frame in an angular square shape, along with gold metal detailing on the sides for unique chic style and added shine. The lightweight construction offers comfortable all-day wear, while the hinged temples and molded nose rest ensure a perfect stay-put fit. Plus, the UV-resistant properties help to protect your eyes from harmful UV rays.

A New Day™: Style that goes wherever you do.
